name: quote-chaser
description: A lightweight estimate follow-up tool for roofing contractors.

NEXT_PUBLIC_APP_NAME.description: Public app name shown in the UI.

OPENAI_API_KEY.description: Optional API key for AI-assisted draft generation.

OPENAI_MODEL.description: Optional model override for AI draft generation.

OPENAI_DRAFT_CONTEXT_LIMIT.description: Optional number of recent activities to include in AI prompts.

OPENAI_DRAFT_STYLE_HINT.description: Optional style hint for AI-generated drafts.
